goal: Build an OmniGraph action graph on a Nova Carter that subscribes /cmd_vel (Twist), routes through Break3Vector into a DifferentialController targeting the two front drive joints, and publishes /joint_states at 30 Hz — all on the isaacsim.* namespace, no deprecated 4.x.
thoughts: Nova Carter needs three things before ROS2 will work end-to-end: (a) wheel collision approximation set to convexHull (PhysX rejects triangle mesh on dynamic bodies); (b) the ROS2 bridge extension enabled with a ROS2Context node in the graph; (c) correct wiring of SubscribeTwist → Break3Vector → DifferentialController. Key traps: direct Twist→DifferentialController wiring is a double3 vs scalar type mismatch; ArticulationController takes inputs:robotPath (not the common but wrong inputs:usePath); targeting all 6 wheel-like joints fights the passive casters. Ordering matters: scaffold the graph first, add nodes + connections, then set robotPath and joint name list, then run check_collision_mesh so Play does not crash.
code:
# 1. Confirm articulation + enumerate joints
scene_summary()  # expect /World/carter with ArticulationRootAPI and 6 joints

# 2. Fix wheel collision approximation (required before Play)
run_usd_script(script="""
import omni.usd
from pxr import UsdPhysics
stage = omni.usd.get_context().get_stage()
wheels = [
    '/World/carter/chassis_link/wheel_left',
    '/World/carter/chassis_link/wheel_right',
    '/World/carter/chassis_link/caster_swivel_left',
    '/World/carter/chassis_link/caster_swivel_right',
    '/World/carter/chassis_link/caster_wheel_left',
    '/World/carter/chassis_link/caster_wheel_right',
]
for path in wheels:
    prim = stage.GetPrimAtPath(path)
    if prim and prim.HasAPI(UsdPhysics.MeshCollisionAPI):
        prim.GetAttribute('physics:approximation').Set('convexHull')
        print(f'set convexHull on {path}')
""")

# 3. Scaffold the OmniGraph with ROS2 bridge nodes
create_omnigraph(
    graph_path="/World/ros2_graph",
    nodes=[
        # Tuples: (node_name, node_type)
        ("ros2_context", "isaacsim.ros2.bridge.ROS2Context"),
        ("sub_twist",    "isaacsim.ros2.bridge.ROS2SubscribeTwist"),
        ("break3_lin",   "omni.graph.nodes.Break3Vector"),
        ("break3_ang",   "omni.graph.nodes.Break3Vector"),
        ("diff_ctrl",    "isaacsim.core.nodes.DifferentialController"),
        ("art_ctrl",     "isaacsim.core.nodes.IsaacArticulationController"),
        ("pub_js",       "isaacsim.ros2.bridge.ROS2PublishJointState"),
    ],
    connections=[
        # Twist → Break3Vector → DifferentialController scalar inputs
        ("sub_twist.outputs:linearVelocity",  "break3_lin.inputs:tuple"),
        ("sub_twist.outputs:angularVelocity", "break3_ang.inputs:tuple"),
        ("break3_lin.outputs:x", "diff_ctrl.inputs:linearVelocity"),
        ("break3_ang.outputs:z", "diff_ctrl.inputs:angularVelocity"),
        # DifferentialController → ArticulationController
        ("diff_ctrl.outputs:velocityCommand", "art_ctrl.inputs:velocityCommand"),
        # Joint state publisher tapped off the articulation
    ],
)

# 4. Configure node parameters (robotPath on ArticulationController, joint names on DiffController)
run_usd_script(script="""
import omni.graph.core as og
graph = og.Controller.graph('/World/ros2_graph')
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/art_ctrl.inputs:robotPath'), '/World/carter')
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/diff_ctrl.inputs:wheelDistance'), 0.413)
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/diff_ctrl.inputs:wheelRadius'), 0.14)
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/art_ctrl.inputs:jointNames'), ['joint_wheel_left', 'joint_wheel_right'])
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/pub_js.inputs:topicName'), '/joint_states')
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/pub_js.inputs:targetPrim'), '/World/carter')
og.Controller.set(og.Controller.attribute('/World/ros2_graph/sub_twist.inputs:topicName'), '/cmd_vel')
""")

# 5. Verify
inspect_graph(graph_path="/World/ros2_graph")
check_collision_mesh(prim_paths=["/World/carter/chassis_link/wheel_left", "/World/carter/chassis_link/wheel_right"])
failure_modes: Wiring SubscribeTwist.linearVelocity (double3) directly to DifferentialController.linearVelocity (double scalar) — graph will silently output 0 or crash on compile; Break3Vector is required.
Setting inputs:usePath on ArticulationController instead of inputs:robotPath — attribute does not exist; controller runs but never targets the robot.
Including caster joints in the DifferentialController jointNames — the two casters are passive and fighting them consumes torque on every tick.
Using deprecated omni.isaac.ros2_bridge.* node types — they resolve at author time in some Kit builds but fail at runtime on Isaac Sim 5.x.
Skipping the wheel collision approximation step — Play crashes as soon as PhysX tries to simulate a dynamic triangle-mesh wheel.
Forgetting to set ROS2Context domainId (defaults to 0) when the external Nav2 stack is on a different domain — topics are invisible.
